name: foundation-logo
description: Official logo symbolism of the Catholic Digital Commons Foundation

scripts.build:html: mkdir -p dist && pandoc 'CDCF Logo Symbolism.md' --wrap=none -f markdown -t html5 -o dist/logo-symbolism.html
scripts.build:html:standalone: mkdir -p dist && pandoc 'CDCF Logo Symbolism.md' --wrap=none --standalone --embed-resources --css scripts/logo-symbolism-print.css -f markdown -t html5 -o dist/logo-symbolism-standalone.html
